result: The data preprocessing task has been completed. I have loaded the four specified tab-delimited files from `data/input/`, merged them using `full_join` on the `NSID` variable, and extracted the income band variables `W8DINCB` and `W9DINCB`. Following the instructions, I mapped the missing value `-1.0` to the standard code `-1` (Not applicable) and converted `NA` values to `-3` (Not asked). I created two separate age-specific variables, `income_w8` and `income_w9`, using the 16 substantive band labels provided in the metadata. The final output containing only `NSID`, `income_w8`, and `income_w9` has been written to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
